name: Steak and Peppers
recipeIngredient: 4 Beef tenderloin steaks, cut into 1-inch thick (about 4 oz each)
2 medium Green bell peppers, cut into 1/4-inch thick julienne strips
1 Medium red and yellow bell pepper, cut into 1/4-inch thick julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Press beef tenderloin steaks with palm of hand, flattening to 3/4-inch thickness.
2. Brush both sides of steaks with 1 teaspoon oil; press pepper into both sides.
3. Place remaining oil and butter in a 11-3/4 x 7-1/2-inch microwave-safe baking dish; microwave on high for 1 minute or until butter is melted.
4. Add peppers and green onions, stirring to coat with oil mixture. Microwave on high for 4 minutes or until peppers are crisp-tender, stirring once; reserve.
5. Combine soy sauce and cornstarch in a 4-cup microwave-safe glass measure; stir in balsamic vinegar, apple juice, tomato juice, and hot pepper sauce.
6. Microwave on high for 2 minutes or until mixture boils; stir.
7. Continue cooking on high for 1 to 2 minutes or until sauce is thickened; stirring once.
8. Preheat browning dish on high for 6 to 8 minutes.
9. Meanwhile, stir cooked sauce into reserved peppers and set aside.
10. Press steaks down firmly onto the browning dish.
11. Microwave, uncovered, on high for 2 minutes.
12. Turn steaks and continue cooking on high for 1 to 2 minutes longer or until desired doneness.
13. If necessary, reheat pepper mixture on high for 1 to 2 minutes or until hot.
14. Remove peppers to serving platter with slotted spoon; top with steaks.
15. Serve steaks and peppers with remaining sauce. Makes 4 servings.
